common.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

hero.headline: Artificial intelligence serving Moroccan craftsmanship.
hero.subheadline: Propel your SME into the digital era. Sahel automates your sales, analyzes your data, and enhances your customer relationship in record time.
hero.description: A culinary odyssey in the heart of the ocher city, where ancestral heritage meets contemporary finesse.

masterData.heading: Master your business data.
masterData.description: Sahel uses Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). We don't just use generic AI; we train a private model on your own documents: PDF catalogs, menus, inventories, and customer histories.
masterData.privacyDesc: Your data stays in your secure environment in Morocco.
masterData.contextualDesc: It accurately answers questions about your specific stock or services.

features.heading: Everything you need to shine.
features.subheading: A complete suite of smart tools to transform your local business into a digital leader.
features.whatsappDesc: Manage bookings, answer FAQs, and sell 24/7 on WhatsApp with AI that speaks Darija and French.
features.telegramDesc: Get the same AI assistant on Telegram. Manage orders and questions from your preferred app.
features.analyticsDesc: View your real-time performance: sales, top products, and customer satisfaction.
features.autoSiteDesc: Your online store is created automatically from your social networks. No technical skills needed.

localImpact.heading: Digital inclusion for every SME.
localImpact.description: In Morocco, thousands of local artisans and merchants are excluded from the digital economy for lack of time or technical resources. Sahel breaks these barriers by offering powerful, affordable, local tools.
localImpact.testimonial: "Sahel allowed us to reach customers worldwide while staying in our workshop in Fez."

trust.heading: Data Protection
trust.description: Your documents are not used to train public models. AI processing goes through a trusted third party (Groq) and your data stays under your control.
trust.authDesc: Protected by JWT, hashed passwords (PBKDF2), and Google OAuth support. Your dashboard is accessible only by you.
trust.backupDesc: The chatbot keeps your conversation history. You can export your data or delete your account anytime from your dashboard.

pricing.heading: An investment in your future.
pricing.freeDesc: Ideal for discovering Sahel with no commitment.
pricing.proDesc: The complete solution for ambitious merchants.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Does the AI really understand Darija?
faq.a1: Yes, we have specifically trained our models on data corpora including the subtleties of Darija (Moroccan dialectal Arabic) written in Latin or Arabic characters, for an authentic interaction with your local customers.
faq.q2: Can I keep my current WhatsApp number?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Sahel integrates with your current Business number via the official WhatsApp API to ensure a seamless transition while preserving your customer history.
faq.q3: Is it easy to set up without technical knowledge?
faq.a3: That's our priority. Most of our clients launch their solution in less than 15 minutes. Our team also supports you free of charge during the initial setup.

cta.heading: Join the local e-commerce revolution.
cta.subheading: Over 500 Moroccan businesses already use Sahel.ai to boost their sales.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Sahel.ai to boost your business with AI.
faq.a1: Sahel.ai is a platform that allows any Moroccan business — hotel, restaurant, pharmacy, shop — to create an AI chatbot and mini-site in under 5 minutes, with no technical skills. Sahel (سهل) means "easy" in Arabic.
faq.a2: Yes. The free plan gives you 1 business, an operational AI chatbot, a hosted mini-site, a downloadable QR code, and 50 conversations per month — no credit card required. The Pro plan at 99 MAD/month adds unlimited businesses, analytics, and WhatsApp notifications.
faq.q3: What type of business can use Sahel.ai?
faq.a3: All types: hotel, riad, restaurant, café, pharmacy, clinic, grocery store, real estate agency, hair salon... As soon as you have customers asking repetitive questions, Sahel.ai saves you time.
faq.a4: None. You fill out a form like you would a Word document, upload your services PDF, and Sahel.ai does the rest automatically. If you can send a WhatsApp message, you can use Sahel.ai.
faq.q5: How does the chatbot know my business info?
faq.a5: You upload your documents (menu, prices, FAQ, hours...) as PDF or Word during creation. The AI reads and memorizes all that content. It then only answers from this information — never makes things up.
faq.q6: What language does the chatbot respond in?
faq.a6: The chatbot automatically detects your visitor's language and responds in the same language. It supports classical Arabic, Moroccan Darija, French, and English. No manual configuration needed.
faq.q7: What if the chatbot doesn't know the answer?
faq.a7: If the information isn't in your documents, the chatbot clearly says so and invites the visitor to contact the business directly via WhatsApp or phone. It never guesses or makes up information.
faq.q8: How do I update my chatbot's information?
faq.a8: From your dashboard, click "Edit" next to your business and upload a new PDF. The chatbot is automatically updated within seconds.
faq.a9: On Sahel.ai's servers, for free. Your URL looks like: sahel.ai/business/your-business-name. Nothing to configure or pay for hosting.
faq.q10: I already have a website, can I still use Sahel.ai?
faq.a10: Yes. After creating your chatbot, Sahel.ai gives you a one-line snippet to paste into your existing site. A chat bubble will automatically appear on your current site, powered by your Sahel.ai AI.
faq.q11: How do I share my mini-site with customers?
faq.a11: Three ways: (1) Share the link directly on WhatsApp, Instagram, or Google Maps. (2) Print the QR code and display it in your business — customers scan with their phone. (3) If you have a site, embed the widget with one line of code.
faq.q12: Do I need an account to use Sahel.ai?
faq.a12: No. You can create your chatbot without an account. An account is only needed to access the analytics dashboard, modify your content after creation, and manage multiple businesses.
faq.q13: How do I upgrade to the Pro plan?
faq.a13: From your dashboard, click "Upgrade to Pro". Payment is by bank transfer or via the contact page — we'll send you instructions. No online payment required for now.

contact.subtitle: For setup, a sales question, or personalized support, feel free to contact the Sahel.ai team.

about.headline: Making AI accessible
about.description: In Morocco, nearly 93% of SMEs still lack a structured digital presence. Sahel, meaning "easy" in Arabic, is our answer to this challenge.
about.quote: Artificial intelligence should not be a technological luxury, but digital craftsmanship serving the local economy.
about.localAutomationDesc: We translate the business know-how of Moroccan companies into intelligent agents, capable of managing customer interactions without any technical complexity for the owner.
about.zeroBarrierDesc: Our mission is to remove the "fear of the screen." Sahel.ai is designed as an intuitive productivity tool, as simple as a conversation.
about.techDesc: Actual Sahel.ai stack: React mini-sites, FastAPI backend, RAG with FAISS and HuggingFace embeddings, Groq inference, PostgreSQL on Supabase, API deployment on HuggingFace Spaces (Docker).
about.academicDesc: This project is carried out as part of the Final Year Project (PFE) at the École Supérieure de Technologie de Meknès (EST Meknès).

consent.title: Sahel.ai uses cookies
consent.description: We use necessary cookies and anonymous analytics to improve your experience.

legal.lastUpdate: Last updated: April 2026 — Sahel.ai, developed as part of a PFE internship at Minnova Consulting, Tinghir, Morocco.
legal.dataCollectedDesc: Sahel.ai only collects data necessary for the platform's operation:
legal.dataItem1: Full name and email address during registration
legal.dataItem2: Business information (name, type, description, hours) entered in the form
legal.dataItem3: Uploaded documents (PDF, Word) containing business information
legal.dataItem5: IP address and browser for security purposes only
legal.dataUsageDesc: Your data is used exclusively to operate your chatbot, send you service notifications, improve AI responses, and contact you about technical issues. Sahel.ai never sells your data to third parties and does not use your documents to train global models.
legal.hostingDesc: All data is stored on Supabase (European servers) with encryption in transit (HTTPS) and at rest. Uploaded documents are processed locally in our RAG pipeline and never transmitted to third-party services without your consent. Your Groq API key is never exposed client-side.
legal.retentionDesc: Your business data is kept as long as your account is active. Conversation logs are kept for 90 rolling days. After account deletion, all your data is permanently erased within 30 days.
legal.yourRightsDesc: Under GDPR and Moroccan law 09-08 on data protection, you have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your data at any time from your dashboard or by contacting us at: contact@sahel.ai
legal.termsAcceptanceDesc: These Terms of Service govern access to and use of the Sahel.ai platform, developed by MOUHAMED as part of a PFE internship at Minnova Consulting, Tinghir. By using Sahel.ai, you unreservedly accept these terms.
legal.serviceDesc: Sahel.ai is a SaaS platform allowing Moroccan businesses to create a personalized AI chatbot and mini-site from their documents. The service includes: chatbot creation and hosting, public mini-site generation, downloadable QR code, and analytics dashboard.
legal.userObligationsDesc: By using Sahel.ai, you agree to:
legal.obligation1: Provide accurate and legal information about your business
legal.obligation2: Not upload illegal, defamatory, or misleading content
legal.obligation3: Not attempt to circumvent free plan limits
legal.obligation4: Not use Sahel.ai for fraudulent or commercially abusive purposes
legal.obligation5: Be responsible for your chatbot's content toward your customers
legal.liabilityDesc: Sahel.ai is provided "as is" as part of a student project. We do not guarantee 24/7 availability or absolute accuracy of chatbot responses. The user is solely responsible for the information provided in their documents and the responses generated by their chatbot.
legal.ipDesc: The source code, design, and Sahel.ai brand are the property of their author. User-uploaded content (documents, descriptions) remains their exclusive property. Sahel.ai acquires no rights to your business data.
legal.terminationDesc: You can delete your account and all your businesses at any time from your dashboard. Sahel.ai reserves the right to suspend an account in case of violation of these terms, without notice.
legal.applicableLawDesc: These Terms are subject to Moroccan law. In case of dispute, the competent courts are those of Tinghir, Morocco.
legal.cookieWhatDesc: A cookie is a small text file stored in your browser during your visit. Sahel.ai uses a minimal number of cookies, listed below with their exact function.
legal.cookieSession: Authentication Session — Required — Managed by Supabase Auth. Keeps you logged in to your dashboard without re-entering your password. Expires after 7 days of inactivity.
legal.cookieGdpr: GDPR Preferences — Required — Remembers your cookie consent choice so you aren't asked again. Stored in localStorage. Expires after 1 year.
legal.cookieAnalytics: Internal Analytics — Functional — Counts conversations on your chatbot, languages used, most frequent questions. 100% anonymous data, never shared.
legal.cookieNoAd: No advertising cookies — Not used — Sahel.ai contains no ad trackers (Google Ads, Facebook Pixel, etc.). None of your browsing data is sold or transmitted to ad networks.
